allow: Bash(node -e "const ts = require\('typescript'\); const cfg = ts.readConfigFile\('test/tsconfig.json', ts.sys.readFile\); const parsed = ts.parseJsonConfigFileContent\(cfg.config, ts.sys, 'test/'\); console.log\('Files:', parsed.fileNames.filter\(f => f.includes\('jest'\) || f.includes\('logs'\) || f.includes\('e2e'\)\)\);")
